message:
fix(cli): flush storage after undefer to persist state changes

Add missing flush_no_db_if_dirty() call at the end of execute_undefer,
ensuring that undefer operations (moving issues from deferred back to
open status) are written to disk. Without this flush, undefer changes
could be lost if no subsequent command triggered a write.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
